# Herts & Essex Host Families

> Quality homestay accommodation matching international students with vetted host families across Hertfordshire, Essex, and Greater London.

Herts & Essex Host Families (HEHF) partners with language schools and summer programmes to place international students with welcoming local host families. We support hosts with onboarding, bookings, and 24/7 assistance, and we help partner schools coordinate group placements.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HEHF and our homestay services.
- [About Us](/about): Who we are, our mission, and our team.
- [Become a Host](/become-host): How to join as a host family and what's involved.
- [Become a Partner](/become-partner): Partnership information for language schools and agencies.
- [Summer Schools](/summer-schools): Group accommodation for summer school programmes.
- [Travel](/travel): Travel and transfer information for students.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions from hosts, students, and partners.
- [Contact Us](/contact): Get in touch with the HEHF team.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms-conditions): Legal terms for using our services.

## Locations

- [Cheshunt](/locations/Cheshunt): Homestays in Cheshunt, Hertfordshire.
- [Harpenden](/locations/Harpenden): Homestays in Harpenden, Hertfordshire.
- [Stevenage](/locations/Stevenage): Homestays in Stevenage, Hertfordshire.
- [Watford](/locations/Watford): Homestays in Watford, Hertfordshire.
- [Elstree & Borehamwood](/locations/Elstree-and-Borehamwood): Homestays in Elstree and Borehamwood.
- [Chingford](/locations/Chingford): Homestays in Chingford, Essex.
- [Loughton](/locations/Loughton): Homestays in Loughton, Essex.
- [Harrow](/locations/Harrow): Homestays in Harrow, Greater London.
- [Hatch End](/locations/Hatch-End): Homestays in Hatch End, Greater London.
